summary: Please feel free to follow and DM. # Work - Nomura Research Institute, Ltd # Job/Role - Security Consultant # Award - AWS Samurai 2018 - AWS Samurai 2019 - AWS Samurai 2020 - AWS Community Builder (Security) (2020) - AWS Community Hero (2021) - AWS Security Hero (2023) - APJ User Group of the Year (2023) - APJ Community Leader Award 2024 "Think Big" (2024) # Community Leader - Security-JAWS (2016 - now) | https://s-jaws.connpass.com/ - JAWS-UG Tokyo (2018 - 2023) | https://jawsug.connpass.com/ - X-Tech JAWS (2017 - 2022) | https://xtechjaws.doorkeeper.jp/ # Community / Event Chairman - JAWS DAYS 2019 Chairman (Onsight/2,300 Participants) - JAWS SONIC 2020 / MIDNIGHT JAWS 2020 Chairman (24-hours/Domestic Virtual Online) - JAWS PANKRATION 2021 Chairman (24hours/Global Virtual Online) - JAWS PANKRATION 2024 Chairman (24hours/Global Virtual Online) # Speaker - AWS Summit Tokyo 2015 - AWS Summit Tokyo 2020 - AWS Summit Tokyo 2021 - AWS Summit Tokyo 2022 - AWS APAC Community Summit 2022 - AWS Dev Day 2022 Day0 - AWS Summit Tokyo 2023 - AWS re:Inforce 2024 - AWS Summit Tokyo 2024 - AWS Community Day Taiwan 2024 - AWS Summit Tokyo 2025 # Interesting - CNAPP - Multi-Cloud - Security Observability - Threat Intelligence - Community Management # Book - 効果的な導入・運用のための Amazon Web Services活用入門 | https://book.mynavi.jp/ec/products/detail/id=54224 - ITロードマップ 2023年版 | https://str.toyokeizai.net/books/9784492581209/ - マルチクラウドセキュリティの教科書 | https://www.shoeisha.co.jp/book/detail/9784798190853
